summary: Terrific concert captured with an excellent audience recording; the Severson pull is hailed as the best‑sounding source.
review: Reviewers rave about this show, calling it terrific and noting that the Severson audience pull delivers the clearest and most vibrant sound of the three available sources. The recording quality is praised as top‑notch for an Aud source, making the performance highly enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: Single enthusiastic 5‑star review highlights both a superb performance and excellent audience recording quality, leading to a high rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes this Severson pull as the best‑sounding audience source among several, noting clear and vibrant sound.
